subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy numerous letters were received, and whenever opportunity arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب متعدده شما رسید و هر وقت بمحض آنکه فرصتی حاصل گردد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
